# Organising critique <span class="badge badge-draft1">✎ Very rough draft</span>

```{r}
#| include: false
if(file.exists("../_setup.R")){source("../_setup.R")}
```

## What to do in what order

- Valuing your time
- Prioritising the most informative checks

## Critiquing what matters

- Critique as awareness raising / confrontation of hubris

## Meta-science findings should not be anonymised

- The case for transparency in identifying problematic work

## Communicating critique

- Communication pathways to elicit correction of the scientific record and scientific belief

## Dealing with common responses

- "Do the numbers matter?"
- Sometimes people are accused of not having the expertise/credentials to critique, but no-one needs credentials to cite
- "No critique, only cite"

## Legal issues

- Considerations around defamation, legal threats, and protecting yourself when publishing critiques
